urdu transliteration text:
zainab ne kaha ye ro ro kar do hausla baba zainab ko tanha hai layeeno may dukhtar do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Zainab asked her Father with tears to give her courage when she is alone among these corrupts

urdu transliteration text:
baba mai badi beti hoo teri
sab badla lengay mujhse tera
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O’ father I am your eldest daughter, they will take revenge from me now

urdu transliteration text:
logon ke badalte hai tewar do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: They are changing their behaviour against me, give me courage Father

urdu transliteration text:
ye zainab hai kulsoom hai ye aapas may sitamgar kehte hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: “this is Zainab, this is Kulsoom” the oppressors tell each other

urdu transliteration text:
haste hai tamshayi hum par do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: they are making fun of us, give us courage Father

urdu transliteration text:
himmat yun badhao beti ki abid ko bachakar kejaye
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: give me courage so I should rescue Abid

urdu transliteration text:
har ghar se baraste hai pathar
do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: each household is throwing rocks at us, give us courage Father

urdu transliteration text:
ehsas rida ka hoga mujhe
tum haath mere sar par rakhdo
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: your hand over my head will give me a sense of covering

urdu transliteration text:
mushkil hai agar dena chadar do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: if its hard for you to give me chadar, give me courage Father

urdu transliteration text:
logon ki nigahein uth-ti hai tasheer ki zarbein jalti hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: the looks of people are like deep cuts for us

urdu transliteration text:
beti hai teri zere khanjar
do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: your daughter is under the dagger (of bad looks) give me courage Father

urdu transliteration text:
darbar ke us darwaze par amma ko sambhala tha tumne
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You gave support to our Mother on that door of the tyrant

urdu transliteration text:
darbar ke is darwaze par
do hausla baba zainab ko
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: give me support in the same way on the door of this tyrant oh Father!
